# 長期照護醫師意見書問卷回覆範例 (AA12) - 臺灣長期照顧實作指引(TW LTC IG) v1.0.0

* [**Artifacts Summary**](artifacts.md)
* **長期照護醫師意見書問卷回覆範例 (AA12)**

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 長期照護醫師意見書問卷回覆範例 (AA12)

Profile: [長期照護醫師意見書問卷回覆 (AA12)](StructureDefinition-LTCQuestionnaireResponseAA12.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ltc-questionnaire-response-aa12-example
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[長期照護醫師意見書 (AA12)](Questionnaire-ltc-questionnaire-aa12-example.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)applicant-reference
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 申請者（Patient Resource ID）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [陳明慧 Female, DoB: 1945-03-15 ( National Person Identifier (TWN): A123456789 (use: official, ))](Patient-ltc-patient-chen-ming-hui.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)physician-reference
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 開立醫師（PractitionerRole Resource ID）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [Practitioner 王醫師](Practitioner-ltc-practitioner-physician-aa12-example.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)institution-reference
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 醫療機構（Organization Resource ID）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [Organization 台北市立聯合醫院](Organization-twcore-organization-hospital-aa12-example.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)last-consultation-date
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 最近一次診察日期
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 2024-01-10
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)opinion-count
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 製作意見書次數
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 初次
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)previous-opinion-date
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 前次意見書日期
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)consultation-departments
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 目前診察科別
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [SNOMED CT: 419192003](http://snomed.info/id/419192003) (Internal medicine)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)disease-name
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 診斷疾病名稱
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)disease-icd
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ICD代碼
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)disease-onset
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 發病日期
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)condition-status
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 病情狀態
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [Condition Clinical Status Codes: active](http://terminology.hl7.org/7.0.1/CodeSystem-condition-clinical.html#condition-clinical-active) (Active)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)unstable-reason
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 不穩定狀態說明
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)recent-treatment
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 過去7日內接受的治療
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)other-treatment
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 其他重要治療
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)care-precautions
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 照顧應注意事項及處置方法
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)other-precautions
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 其他注意事項
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)treatment-suggestions
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 處置建議
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 定期監測血糖和血壓，維持健康飲食
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)recommended-services
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 建議介入之醫事照護服務
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): ADLs復能照護一居家
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)other-services
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 其他醫事照護服務
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)six-month-impact
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 最近六個月內可能影響長照服務使用狀況及如何照顧特殊疾病的方法
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 需要定期醫療追蹤和血糖監測
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)infectious-disease
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 罹患感染症
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 無
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)infectious-disease-name
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 感染症病名
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)isolation-required
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 是否需要隔離
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)isolation-type
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 隔離類型
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)physical-mental-status
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 身心狀態或特殊需要註記事項
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 患者意識清楚，配合度高，需要協助日常生活活動
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "ltc-questionnaire-response-aa12-example",

    "profile" : ["http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/StructureDefinition/LTCQuestionnaireResponseAA12"]

    "reference" : "Patient/ltc-patient-chen-ming-hui"

  "authored" : "2024-01-15T10:30:00+08:00",

    "reference" : "Practitioner/ltc-practitioner-physician-aa12-example"
  },
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "applicant-reference",
    "text" : "申請者（Patient Resource ID）",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueReference" : {
        "reference" : "Patient/ltc-patient-chen-ming-hui"
      }
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "physician-reference",
    "text" : "開立醫師（PractitionerRole Resource ID）",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueReference" : {
        "reference" : "Practitioner/ltc-practitioner-physician-aa12-example"
      }
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "institution-reference",
    "text" : "醫療機構（Organization Resource ID）",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueReference" : {
        "reference" : "Organization/twcore-organization-hospital-aa12-example"
      }
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "last-consultation-date",
    "text" : "最近一次診察日期",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueDate" : "2024-01-10"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "opinion-count",
    "text" : "製作意見書次數",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "初次"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "previous-opinion-date",
    "text" : "前次意見書日期"
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "consultation-departments",
    "text" : "目前診察科別",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueCoding" : {
        "system" : "http://snomed.info/sct",
        "code" : "419192003",
        "display" : "Internal medicine"
      }
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "disease-name",
    "text" : "診斷疾病名稱",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "糖尿病"
    },
    {
      "valueString" : "高血壓"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "disease-icd",
    "text" : "ICD代碼",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "E11.9"
    },
    {
      "valueString" : "I10"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "disease-onset",
    "text" : "發病日期",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueDate" : "2020-03-15"
    },
    {
      "valueDate" : "2018-07-20"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "condition-status",
    "text" : "病情狀態",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueCoding" : {
        "system" : "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical",
        "code" : "active",
        "display" : "Active"
      }
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "unstable-reason",
    "text" : "不穩定狀態說明"
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "recent-treatment",
    "text" : "過去7日內接受的治療",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "監測器"
    },
    {
      "valueString" : "物理治療"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "other-treatment",
    "text" : "其他重要治療"
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "care-precautions",
    "text" : "照顧應注意事項及處置方法",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "尿失禁"
    },
    {
      "valueString" : "跌倒•骨折"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "other-precautions",
    "text" : "其他注意事項"
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "treatment-suggestions",
    "text" : "處置建議",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "定期監測血糖和血壓，維持健康飲食"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "recommended-services",
    "text" : "建議介入之醫事照護服務",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "ADLs復能照護一居家"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "other-services",
    "text" : "其他醫事照護服務"
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "six-month-impact",
    "text" : "最近六個月內可能影響長照服務使用狀況及如何照顧特殊疾病的方法",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "需要定期醫療追蹤和血糖監測"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "infectious-disease",
    "text" : "罹患感染症",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "無"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "infectious-disease-name",
    "text" : "感染症病名"
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "isolation-required",
    "text" : "是否需要隔離",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : false
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "isolation-type",
    "text" : "隔離類型"
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "physical-mental-status",
    "text" : "身心狀態或特殊需要註記事項",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "患者意識清楚，配合度高，需要協助日常生活活動"
    }]
  }]
}
